# CHECKION project improvement opportunities (2026-02-27 20:37Z)

_**User**_

Explore the CHECKION project at /Users/christoph.bordeck/Desktop/ANTIGRAVITY/CHECKION-1. Your goal: identify improvement opportunities and potential new features.

Tasks:
1. Map the project structure: app/, lib/, components/, what APIs exist, what scan modes (single, deep, journey, geo-eeat)
2. Check: test coverage, error handling patterns, i18n completeness, accessibility (WCAG focus), security (auth, env)
3. Review: knowledge/ folder for documented decisions, any tech debt or TODOs
4. Identify 5-10 concrete improvements (code quality, UX, performance, DX)
5. Suggest 3-5 new feature ideas that fit the CHECKION vision (accessibility + GEO/E-E-A-T + UX analysis)

Return a structured summary: Project Overview, Strengths, Improvement Opportunities (categorized), New Feature Ideas. Be specific with file paths and actionable recommendations.

            "text": "# CHECKION – Auth &amp; Datenbank",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Übersicht",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Datenbank:** PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM, &#96;pg&#96;-Driver)",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Auth:** NextAuth v5 mit Credentials-Provider (E-Mail + Passwort), JWT-Session",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Tabellen",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **users:** id, email, password_hash, name, company, avatar_url, locale, created_at (timestamptz)",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **scans:** id, user_id, url, device, group_id, timestamp, result (jsonb)",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **domain_scans:** id, user_id, domain, status, timestamp, payload (jsonb)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "Scans und Domain-Scans sind immer einem User zugeordnet (&#96;user_id&#96;). API-Routen liefern nur Daten des eingeloggten Users (401 ohne Session).",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "## Schema anlegen",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "Nach dem Erstellen der Datenbank Tabellen anlegen mit:",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "npx drizzle-kit push",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "(erfordert &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96; in &#96;.env&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "## Umgebung",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;AUTH_SECRET&#96;: Pflicht für NextAuth (z. B. &#96;npx auth secret&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96;: Pflicht, z. B. &#96;postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/checkion&#96; (Neon, Supabase, Railway, etc.)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "## Routen",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },

            "text": "- **POST /api/auth/register** – Registrierung (email, password, name optional)",

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "## Middleware",

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "## Session-Cookie",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./lib/scanner.ts",
        "range": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "/*  CHECKION – Pa11y + axe-core scanner wrapper                       */",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import puppeteer from 'puppeteer';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import fs from 'fs';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import path from 'path';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "import { dismissCookieBanner } from './cookie-banner-dismiss';",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "import { buildPageIndex } from './page-index';",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "import { writeScreenshot } from './screenshot-storage';",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "import type { Issue, Runner, ScanResult, ScanStats, WcagStandard, Device, ScanOptions, SeoAudit } from './types';",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * Viewport definitions for supported devices.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "const VIEWPORTS: Record&lt;Device, { width: number; height: number; isMobile: boolean; hasTouch: boolean }&gt; = {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    desktop: { width: 1920, height: 1080, isMobile: false, hasTouch: false },",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    tablet: { width: 768, height: 1024, isMobile: true, hasTouch: true }, // iPad Portrait",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    mobile: { width: 375, height: 667, isMobile: true, hasTouch: true }, // iPhone SE",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "/** Only log geo lookup network failure once per process to avoid log spam. */",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "let geoNetworkWarned = false;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": " * Map pa11y's numeric type codes to our severity labels.",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": " * Pa11y uses: 1 = error, 2 = warning, 3 = notice",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "function mapSeverity(typeCode: number | string): Issue['type'] {",
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (typeCode === 1 || typeCode === 'error') return 'error';",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (typeCode === 2 || typeCode === 'warning') return 'warning';",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    return 'notice';",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "/** Detect which runner produced an issue based on its code prefix. */",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "function detectRunner(code: string): Runner {",
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    // axe-core issues contain dashes in their IDs (e.g. \"color-contrast\")",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    // HTML_CodeSniffer issues follow the dot-separated WCAG path format",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (/^[a-z]/.test(code) &amp;&amp; code.includes('-')) return 'axe';",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2720777094364166
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./lib/scanner.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 54
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 91,
            "column": 3
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function isInternalLink(href: string, pageOrigin: string): boolean {",
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": " * Detect WCAG Level from the issue code.",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": " * HTMLCS codes usually look like \"WCAG2AA.Principle1...\"",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": " * Axe codes don't have level directly in the code, but we might infer or default to Unknown/A.",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": " * Ideally we'd map axe tags, but pa11y might not expose them fully in the standard output.",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": " * We'll do best-effort parsing for now.",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "function detectWcagLevel(code: string): Issue['wcagLevel'] {",
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    const upperCode = code.toUpperCase();",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (upperCode.includes('WCAG2AAA')) return 'AAA';",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (upperCode.includes('WCAG2AA')) return 'AA';",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (upperCode.includes('WCAG2A')) return 'A';",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    // APCA / WCAG 3.0 Experimental",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (upperCode.includes('APCA') || upperCode.includes('COLOR-CONTRAST-ENHANCED')) return 'APCA';",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Fallback/Heuristic for Axe or other codes if they contain level indicators",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    return 'Unknown';",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": " * Calculate a simple accessibility score (0-100).",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": " * Heuristic: Start at 100. Deduct points for errors and warnings.",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Error: -2 points",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Warning: -0.5 points",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": " * - Notice: -0.1 points (negligible)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": " * Clamped to 0.",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 92
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./knowledge/cookie-banner-dismiss.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 41
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Cookie-Banner-Unterdrückung im Scan",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Damit Scans (Screenshot, axe/htmlcs) nicht durch Cookie-/Consent-Banner verfälscht werden, blendet CHECKION Banner vor dem Lauf aus und versucht, „Akzeptieren“-Buttons zu klicken.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## Wo es wirkt",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;lib/cookie-banner-dismiss.ts&#96;**: CSS-Selektoren, Button-Texte (mehrsprachig), Skript für Browser-Kontext, Puppeteer-Helfer &#96;dismissCookieBanner(page)&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;lib/scanner.ts&#96;**:",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  1. Nach eigener Navigation (&#96;page.goto&#96;) wird &#96;dismissCookieBanner(page)&#96; aufgerufen, **bevor** pa11y (axe/htmlcs) läuft.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  2. Vor dem Screenshot wird es erneut aufgerufen (für verzögert geladene Banner).",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "## Ablauf",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **CSS ausblenden**: Ein &#96;&lt;style&gt;&#96; mit vielen Selektoren wird injiziert (&#96;display: none !important&#96; etc.) für bekannte Container (OneTrust, Cookiebot, CookieYes, …) und generische Muster (&#96;[id*=\"cookie\"]&#96;, &#96;[aria-label*=\"consent\"]&#96; usw.).",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Klick per Selektor**: Feste Selektoren für typische „Akzeptieren“-Buttons (z. B. &#96;#onetrust-accept-btn-handler&#96;, &#96;.cky-btn-accept&#96;, …) werden nacheinander geprüft; der erste sichtbare wird geklickt.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Klick per Text**: Alle &#96;button&#96;, &#96;a&#96;, &#96;[role=\"button\"]&#96;, &#96;input[type=\"submit\"]&#96; werden gesammelt; deren Text (inkl. &#96;aria-label&#96;) wird normalisiert und mit einer mehrsprachigen Liste von Akzeptieren-Texten abgeglichen; der erste Treffer wird geklickt.",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "## Abgedeckte Anbieter / Integrationen (CSS + ggf. Klick)",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- OneTrust  ",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- Cookiebot  ",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- CookieYes  ",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- Quantcast Choice  ",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- Termly  ",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- TrustArc  ",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- Cookie Law Info / CLI  ",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- GDPR Cookie Consent (Moove)  ",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- Complianz  ",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- Didomi  ",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- Axeptio  ",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- Tarteaucitron  ",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- Generische Muster (cookie, consent, gdpr, cc-window, …)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "## Sprachen für Button-Erkennung",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "DE, EN, FR, ES, IT, NL, PL, PT, SV, DA, NO, FI, CS, SK, HU, RO, BG, EL, RU, TR, JA, ZH, AR, HE (u. a. „Akzeptieren“, „Accept“, „Accept all“, „accepter“, „aceptar“, „accetta“, „akzeptuj“, „同意“, „قبول“, „קבל“ usw.).",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "## Erweiterung",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Neue Anbieter**: In &#96;lib/cookie-banner-dismiss.ts&#96; &#96;COOKIE_BANNER_HIDE_CSS&#96; um Container-Selektoren und ggf. &#96;ACCEPT_BUTTON_SELECTORS&#96; um den Akzept-Button erweitern.",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Neue Sprachen/Texte**: In &#96;ACCEPT_BUTTON_TEXTS&#96; weitere Zeilen (klein geschrieben) ergänzen.",
            "lineNumber": 41
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25154709815979004
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./lib/scanner.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 97
          },
          "endPosition": {

          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 98,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 98,
                "column": 8
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 98,
                "column": 8
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 99,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export async function runScan(options: ScanOptions &amp; { groupId?: string }): Promise&lt;ScanResult&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Set User Agent based on device (simplified)",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (device === 'mobile') {",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "        await page.setUserAgent('Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 15_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1');",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (device === 'tablet') {",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "        await page.setUserAgent('Mozilla/5.0 (iPad; CPU OS 15_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/15.0 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1');",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    try {",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Navigate first so we can dismiss cookie banners before pa11y runs",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "        await page.goto(url, { waitUntil: 'networkidle2', timeout: 60_000 });",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "        await dismissCookieBanner(page);",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "        const results = await pa11y(url, {",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "            browser,",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "            page,",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "            viewport,",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "            standard,",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "            runners: pa11yRunners,",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "            timeout: 60_000, // Increase timeout for visual scan",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "            wait: 1_000,",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "            ignoreUrl: true, // Page already loaded and banner dismissed above",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "        } as any);",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "        // --- Aggressive Scroll for CLS ---",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Scroll down and up to trigger lazy loads and layout shifts",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "        await page.evaluate(async function () {",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "            const distance = 100;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "            const delay = 50;",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "            const totalHeight = document.body.scrollHeight;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "            let currentScroll = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "            // Scroll Down",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "            while ((window.innerHeight + currentScroll) &lt; totalHeight) {",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "                window.scrollBy(0, distance);",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "                currentScroll += distance;",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "                await new Promise((resolve) =&gt; setTimeout(resolve, delay));",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "                // Cap to avoid infinite loops",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "                if (currentScroll &gt; 5000) break;",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "            }",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "            // Scroll Up Trigger",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "            window.scrollTo(0, 0);",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "        });",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Allow time for shifts to settle",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "        await new Promise((r) =&gt; setTimeout(r, 1000));",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "        // Re-apply cookie banner hide before screenshot (in case of late-loading banners)",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "        await dismissCookieBanner(page);",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "        // --- Extract Performance Metrics (incl. LCP/INP from observers) ---",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 1521,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2507542371749878

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./knowledge/checkion-page-index.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 27
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# CHECKION – Page Index („Was wo &amp; wie auffindbar“)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Stand",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Phase 1 (erledigt):** Regelbasierter Page-Index aus Quellcode",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Typen in &#96;lib/types.ts&#96;: &#96;PageIndex&#96;, &#96;PageIndexRegion&#96;, &#96;PageIndexRegionType&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;lib/page-index.ts&#96;: &#96;buildPageIndex(structureMap, viewportHeight, url)&#96; – Regionen, Findability-Score, semantische Labels (Keyword/Regex + Landmark)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scanner-Integration: jeder Scan liefert &#96;result.pageIndex&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Tests: &#96;npx tsx lib/page-index.test.ts&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Phase 2 (erledigt):** Saliency-Anreicherung",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;PageIndexRegion.saliencyProminence&#96; (0–1), optional, aus Heatmap-RGB (R-Kanal = „heiß“).",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;enrichPageIndexWithSaliency(pageIndex, heatmapDataUrl)&#96; in &#96;lib/page-index.ts&#96; (sharp); Aufruf in &#96;POST /api/saliency/generate&#96; nach Speichern der Heatmap, Anreicherung wird mit persistiert.",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Kombinierter Findability: &#96;findabilityScore + SALIENCY_WEIGHT * saliencyProminence&#96; (SALIENCY_WEIGHT = 0.2), bei Darstellung nutzbar.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "## Dashboard-Darstellung (Plan &amp; Umsetzung)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Ort:** Tab „Struktur &amp; Semantik“ (viewMode &#96;structure&#96;) – unter Document Outline und Structure Map.",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Inhalt:**",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Liste „Seiten-Index (Auffindbarkeit)“:** Pro Region eine Zeile: Tag (z. B. h2, nav), Heading-Text (gekürzt), Above the fold (Ja/Nein), Findability-Score (Zahl), optional Saliency-Prominenz (Balken 0–1), semantischer Typ (Chip, z. B. pricing, faq, contact). Sortierung: indexInDocument oder nach Findability absteigend.",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  - **Umsetzung:** In der „Visuelle Analyse“-Ansicht: Toggle „Regionen hervorheben“; bei Aktivierung zeichnet &#96;PageIndexRegionsOverlay&#96; alle Region-Rects auf dem Screenshot, die hervorgehobene Region (bei Hover in der Liste) mit grünem Rahmen und Label. Kompakte Regionen-Liste unter dem Screenshot mit Hover → setzt &#96;hoveredRegionId&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **i18n:** Keys unter &#96;results.pageIndex.*&#96;, &#96;results.showRegionHighlight&#96;, &#96;results.hoverToHighlight&#96;, &#96;info.pageIndex&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "### Erweiterungen (Buttons &amp; Absätze, Auto-Heatmap)",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Structure Map:** Im Scanner erweitert um &#96;button&#96;, &#96;[role=\"button\"]&#96;, &#96;p&#96; (Level 7 = Button, 8 = Absatz), in Dokumentreihenfolge. Findability: Button 0.8, Absatz 0.4 – so ist erkennbar, wenn z. B. das Produkt nur im Absatz und nicht in der Headline vorkommt (Optimierungspotenzial).",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Heatmap automatisch:** Beim Laden der Ergebnis-Seite wird einmalig &#96;POST /api/saliency/generate&#96; ausgelöst, wenn &#96;screenshot&#96; vorhanden und &#96;saliencyHeatmap&#96; fehlt (Ref verhindert Doppelaufruf).",
            "lineNumber": 27
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22995969653129578
    },

{

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/scan/[id]&#96;, &#96;/api/scan/domain/[id]/summary&#96; → gecachte Einzelabfragen.",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/scan/domain/[id]/status&#96; → **kein Cache**: liefert nur Status/Progress (slim), direkte DB-Abfrage. Vermeidet „items over 2MB can not be cached“ bei großen Domain-Scans beim Polling.",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/share/[token]&#96;, &#96;/api/share/[token]/pages/[pageId]&#96; → gecachte Share- und Domain-Daten.",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "Mutationen (POST/PATCH/DELETE) bleiben in &#96;lib/db/*&#96; und triggern danach die zugehörige Invalidierung.",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "**Next.js Cache-Limit:** &#96;unstable_cache&#96; speichert nur Einträge ≤ 2 MB. Sehr große Domain-Scans (viele Seiten + Aggregation) können dieses Limit überschreiten; dann erscheint „items over 2MB can not be cached“. Die Status-Route umgeht das durch schlanke Antwort ohne Cache. Summary/Detail nutzen weiterhin &#96;getCachedDomainScan&#96;; bei &gt; 2 MB schlägt nur das Speichern im Cache fehl, die Antwort wird trotzdem geliefert.",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "## Weitere Optimierungen (Performance)",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### Frontend (Domain-Seite)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Code-Splitting:** &#96;DomainGraph&#96;, &#96;DomainAggregatedIssueList&#96; und &#96;JourneyFlowchart&#96; werden auf der Domain-Ergebnisseite per &#96;next/dynamic&#96; mit &#96;ssr: false&#96; nachgeladen. Sie erscheinen nur in bestimmten Tabs; der initiale JS-Bundle wird kleiner, der Long Task beim ersten Load reduziert.",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "### Search-API",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Cached Listen:** Die Suche nutzt &#96;listCachedStandaloneScans&#96; und &#96;listCachedDomainScans&#96; statt direkter DB-Abfragen.",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Gecachte Suchergebnisse:** Das Ergebnis von &#96;GET /api/search&#96; wird pro (userId, q, typeFilter, limit) mit &#96;unstable_cache&#96; und Tags &#96;scans-list-${userId}&#96;, &#96;domain-list-${userId}&#96; gecacht (Revalidate wie Listen). Wiederholte gleiche Suchanfragen treffen nicht erneut die DB.",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "### Results-Seite (Einzelscan)",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Code-Splitting:** Schwere View-Mode-Komponenten (UxIssueList, FocusOrderOverlay, StructureMap, PageIndexCard, PageIndexRegionsOverlay, TouchTargetOverlay, SaliencyHeatmapOverlay, SeoCard, LinkAuditCard, InfraCard, PrivacyCard, SecurityCard, TechnicalInsightsCard, GenerativeOptimizerCard) werden per &#96;next/dynamic&#96; mit &#96;ssr: false&#96; nachgeladen; sie laden nur beim Öffnen des jeweiligen Tabs. EcoCard, PerformanceCard, UxCard und ScanIssueList bleiben statisch.",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "### Bundle-Analyzer",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Script:** &#96;npm run analyze&#96; (ANALYZE=true, Webpack-Build). Report in &#96;.next/analyze/&#96;; &#96;openAnalyzer: false&#96; in next.config.mjs. Zweck: große Chunks und Duplikate finden.",
            "lineNumber": 61
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.44737789034843445
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./knowledge/checkion-caching.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# CHECKION – Server-side Caching (DB-Abfragen reduzieren)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Übersicht",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "Um Datenbankabfragen zu reduzieren, nutzt CHECKION **Next.js &#96;unstable_cache&#96;** mit **Tag-basierter Invalidierung**. Gecacht werden nur **Lese-Operationen**; nach Schreib- oder Lösch-Aktionen wird der betroffene Cache per &#96;revalidateTag&#96; invalidiert.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Konstanten:** &#96;lib/constants.ts&#96; – &#96;CACHE_REVALIDATE_*&#96; (Sekunden).",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Cache-Layer:** &#96;lib/cache.ts&#96; – gecachte Getter und &#96;invalidate*&#96;-Hilfen.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## Gecachte Daten",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| Daten | Getter | Tags | Revalidate |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "|-------|--------|------|------------|",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| Einzelscan | &#96;getCachedScan&#96;, &#96;getCachedScanWithSummary&#96; | &#96;scan-${id}&#96; | 60 s |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| Domain-Scan | &#96;getCachedDomainScan&#96; | &#96;domain-${id}&#96; | 60 s |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| Share-Link | &#96;getCachedShareByToken&#96; | &#96;share-${token}&#96; | 300 s |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "| Liste Einzelscans | &#96;listCachedStandaloneScans&#96;, &#96;getCachedStandaloneScansCount&#96; | &#96;scans-list-${userId}&#96; | 30 s |",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "| Liste Domain-Scans (Summaries) | &#96;listCachedDomainScanSummaries&#96;, &#96;getCachedDomainScansCount&#96; | &#96;domain-list-${userId}&#96; | 30 s |",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "| Liste Domain-Scans (voll, für Suche) | &#96;listCachedDomainScans&#96; | &#96;domain-list-${userId}&#96; | 30 s (kann &gt;2MB sein) |",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "| Saved Journeys | &#96;listCachedSavedJourneys&#96;, &#96;getCachedSavedJourneysCount&#96; | &#96;journeys-${userId}&#96;, optional &#96;journeys-${userId}-${domainScanId}&#96; | 30 s |",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "## Invalidierung (nach Mutation aufrufen)",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Scan:** &#96;invalidateScan(id)&#96; + ggf. &#96;invalidateScansList(userId)&#96; (z. B. nach DELETE Scan).",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Domain-Scan:** &#96;invalidateDomainScan(id)&#96; und bei Listenänderung &#96;invalidateDomainList(userId)&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Share:** &#96;invalidateShare(token)&#96; (z. B. nach DELETE Share).",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Journeys:** &#96;invalidateJourneys(userId, domainScanId?)&#96; nach Add/Delete Journey.",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "API-Routen, die schreiben/löschen, rufen die passenden &#96;invalidate*&#96;-Funktionen aus &#96;@/lib/cache&#96; auf.",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "## Wo Cache genutzt wird",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/scan&#96;, &#96;/api/scans/domain&#96;, &#96;/api/journeys&#96; → gecachte Listen/Counts.",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/scan/[id]&#96;, &#96;/api/scan/domain/[id]/summary&#96; → gecachte Einzelabfragen.",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },

            "text": "- **GET** &#96;/api/scan/domain/[id]/status&#96; → **kein Cache**: liefert nur Status/Progress (slim), direkte DB-Abfrage. Vermeidet „items over 2MB can not be cached“ bei großen Domain-Scans beim Polling.",
            "lineNumber": 35

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./knowledge/checkion-domain-scan-storage.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 30
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Domain (Deep) Scan Storage – Refactor",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Übersicht",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "Beim Deep Scan werden **alle relevanten Metriken bereits während des Scans** berechnet und in **einem einzigen DB-Eintrag** (&#96;domain_scans.payload&#96;) gespeichert. Die einzelnen Seiten bleiben als Single-Scans in der Tabelle &#96;scans&#96; (mit &#96;group_id&#96; = Domain-Scan-ID) und sind über &#96;/results/[id]&#96; verlinkt.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Gespeichertes Format (&#96;domain_scans.payload&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **pages**: &#96;SlimPage[]&#96; – nur Referenzen: &#96;id&#96; (Scan-ID), &#96;url&#96;, &#96;score&#96;, &#96;stats&#96;, &#96;ux?.score&#96;. Kein &#96;pageIndex&#96;, keine Issues, kein Screenshot.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **aggregated**: Vorberechnete Aggregationen (issues, ux, seo, links, infra, generative, structure, performance, eco).",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- Wie bisher: &#96;id&#96;, &#96;domain&#96;, &#96;timestamp&#96;, &#96;status&#96;, &#96;progress&#96;, &#96;totalPages&#96;, &#96;score&#96;, &#96;graph&#96;, &#96;systemicIssues&#96;, &#96;eeat&#96;, &#96;error&#96;, &#96;llmSummary&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "## Ablauf Deep Scan",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "1. &#96;POST /api/scan/domain&#96; startet den Scan, erstellt einen leeren Domain-Eintrag.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Spider liefert am Ende &#96;domainResult.pages&#96; (volle &#96;ScanResult[]&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Pro Seite: &#96;addScan(userId, { ...page, groupId: id })&#96; – voller Scan in &#96;scans&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "4. &#96;buildStoredDomainPayload(fullPages, base)&#96; berechnet Aggregationen und baut &#96;pages: SlimPage[]&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "5. &#96;updateDomainScan(id, userId, stored)&#96; speichert den einen schlanken Payload.",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "## Lesen",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Summary / Domain-Seite**: &#96;getCachedDomainScan&#96; → Payload enthält bereits &#96;aggregated&#96; und &#96;pages&#96; (slim). &#96;buildDomainSummary(scan)&#96; gibt bei neuem Format den Payload 1:1 zurück (Legacy: weiterhin Aggregation aus &#96;scan.pages&#96;).",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Journey Agent**: Braucht volle &#96;ScanResult[]&#96; (pageIndex, allLinks, …). Wenn &#96;hasStoredAggregated(scan)&#96;: &#96;listScansByGroupId(userId, domainId)&#96; laden und &#96;{ ...scan, pages: fullPages }&#96; an den Agent übergeben.",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Share (eine Seite)**: &#96;getCachedScan(pageId, share.userId)&#96; – Seite kommt aus &#96;scans&#96;, Domain-Payload nur zur Prüfung, ob &#96;pageId&#96; in &#96;domain.pages&#96; vorkommt.",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Suche**: Bei Domain-Scans mit gespeichertem Aggregat: &#96;listScansByGroupId(userId, ds.id)&#96; und in den vollen Scans suchen.",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "## Rückwärtskompatibilität",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- Alte Payloads ohne &#96;aggregated&#96; und mit &#96;pages: ScanResult[]&#96;: &#96;buildDomainSummary&#96; erkennt das (z. B. über &#96;hasStoredAggregated&#96; / &#96;isFullPages&#96;) und berechnet Aggregation wie bisher. Journey/Suche nutzen in dem Fall weiterhin &#96;ds.pages&#96; direkt.",
            "lineNumber": 30
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.38916879892349243
    },

          {
            "text": "export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {",
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    const session = await auth();",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!session?.user?.id) {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    const q = (searchParams.get('q') ?? '').trim().toLowerCase();",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!q) {",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "        return NextResponse.json({ matches: [] });",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    const typeParam = searchParams.get('type') ?? 'all';",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    const typeFilter = typeParam === 'single' ? 'single' : typeParam === 'domain' ? 'domain' : 'all';",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    const limit = Math.min(100, Math.max(1, Number(searchParams.get('limit')) || 50));",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    const getCachedSearch = unstable_cache(",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        () =&gt; runSearch(session.user.id, q, typeFilter, limit),",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "        ['search', session.user.id, q, typeFilter, String(limit)],",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "        { revalidate: CACHE_REVALIDATE_LIST, tags: [&#96;scans-list-${session.user.id}&#96;, &#96;domain-list-${session.user.id}&#96;] }",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "    const capped = await getCachedSearch();",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "    return NextResponse.json({ matches: capped });",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          {
            "text": "/*  CHECKION – POST /api/saliency/generate (SUM job → jobId | AI → success)  */",

            "text": "/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */",

          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    const cleanText = text.replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim();",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (cleanText.length === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Text is empty' }, { status: 400 });",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    const sentences = cleanText.split(/[.!?]+/).length;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    const words = cleanText.split(/\\s+/).length;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    const syllables = cleanText.split(/[aeiouy]+/).length; // Rough approximation",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level Formula",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    const s_w = sentences &gt; 0 ? (words / sentences) : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    const syl_w = words &gt; 0 ? (syllables / words) : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    let gradeLevel = 0.39 * s_w + 11.8 * syl_w - 15.59;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (isNaN(gradeLevel) || gradeLevel &lt; 0) gradeLevel = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    let grade = 'Unknown';",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (gradeLevel &lt;= 6) grade = 'Easy (6th Grade)';",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    else if (gradeLevel &lt;= 10) grade = 'Standard (High School)';",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    else if (gradeLevel &lt;= 14) grade = 'Complex (College)';",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    else grade = 'Very Complex (Academic)';",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    return NextResponse.json({",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "        success: true,",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        data: {",

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./knowledge/checkion-auth-and-database.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# CHECKION – Auth &amp; Datenbank",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Übersicht",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Datenbank:** PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM, &#96;pg&#96;-Driver)",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Auth:** NextAuth v5 mit Credentials-Provider (E-Mail + Passwort), JWT-Session",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Tabellen",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **users:** id, email, password_hash, name, company, avatar_url, locale, created_at (timestamptz)",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **scans:** id, user_id, url, device, group_id, timestamp, result (jsonb)",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **domain_scans:** id, user_id, domain, status, timestamp, payload (jsonb)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "Scans und Domain-Scans sind immer einem User zugeordnet (&#96;user_id&#96;). API-Routen liefern nur Daten des eingeloggten Users (401 ohne Session).",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "## Schema anlegen",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "Nach dem Erstellen der Datenbank Tabellen anlegen mit:",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "npx drizzle-kit push",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "(erfordert &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96; in &#96;.env&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "## Umgebung",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;AUTH_SECRET&#96;: Pflicht für NextAuth (z. B. &#96;npx auth secret&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;DATABASE_URL&#96;: Pflicht, z. B. &#96;postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/checkion&#96; (Neon, Supabase, Railway, etc.)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "## Routen",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **POST /api/auth/register** – Registrierung (email, password, name optional)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **POST /api/auth/callback/credentials** – Login (über NextAuth signIn)",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GET/POST /api/scan** – nur mit Auth; Scans werden in der DB gespeichert und nach User gefiltert",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "## Middleware",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- Schützt &#96;/&#96;, &#96;/scan&#96;, &#96;/results&#96;, &#96;/domain&#96;, &#96;/settings&#96; – ohne Session Redirect auf &#96;/login&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;/login&#96; und &#96;/register&#96; sind öffentlich; mit Session Redirect auf &#96;/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "## Session-Cookie",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- Name: &#96;authjs.session-token&#96; (NextAuth v5)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "- Middleware prüft nur Cookie-Anwesenheit (kein DB-Zugriff im Edge)",
            "lineNumber": 36
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2896774113178253
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./auth.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "/*  CHECKION – NextAuth v5 (Auth.js) with Credentials                 */",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import NextAuth from 'next-auth';",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import Credentials from 'next-auth/providers/credentials';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import { getDb } from '@/lib/db';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import { users } from '@/lib/db/schema';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "import { eq } from 'drizzle-orm';",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "const AUTH_SECRET = process.env.AUTH_SECRET;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' &amp;&amp; (!AUTH_SECRET || AUTH_SECRET.length &lt; 32)) {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    console.error('[CHECKION] AUTH_SECRET is missing or too short (min 32 chars). Set AUTH_SECRET in production.');",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "export const { handlers, signIn, signOut, auth } = NextAuth({",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    secret: AUTH_SECRET || undefined,",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    trustHost: true,",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    providers: [",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        Credentials({",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "            name: 'credentials',",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "            credentials: {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "                email: { label: 'Email', type: 'email' },",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "                password: { label: 'Password', type: 'password' },",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "            },",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "            async authorize(credentials) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "                if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "                try {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const email = String(credentials.email).trim().toLowerCase();",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const db = getDb();",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const [user] = await db.select().from(users).where(eq(users.email, email)).limit(1);",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "                    if (!user) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "                    const ok = await bcrypt.compare(String(credentials.password), user.passwordHash);",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "                    if (!ok) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "                    return { id: user.id, email: user.email, name: user.name ?? undefined };",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "                } catch (e) {",

## CHECKION Project Analysis Report

### 1. Project Overview

**Technology Stack:**
- **Framework:** Next.js 16.1.6 (App Router)
- **React:** 19.2.4
- **Database:** PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
- **Auth:** NextAuth v5 (beta) with Credentials provider
- **UI:** MSQDX Design System + MUI v7
- **Testing:** axe-core 4.11.1, pa11y 8.0.0, Puppeteer 24.37.2
- **AI/LLM:** OpenAI SDK for summaries, GEO/E-E-A-T analysis

**Project Structure:**
- **App Routes:** 58 files (`app/` directory)
- **Components:** 38 files (`components/` directory)
- **Library Code:** 48 files (`lib/` directory)
- **Knowledge Docs:** 26 documented decisions/patterns

**Scan Modes:**
1. **Single Scan** (`/api/scan/route.ts`) - Single URL, 3 devices (desktop/tablet/mobile)
2. **Deep Scan** (`/api/scan/domain/route.ts`) - Domain-wide crawl with sitemap support
3. **Journey Agent** (`/api/scan/journey-agent/route.ts`) - AI-powered user journey simulation
4. **GEO/E-E-A-T** (`/api/scan/geo-eeat/route.ts`) - Geographic + Expertise/Authoritativeness/Trust analysis

**API Endpoints:** 44 API routes covering scans, auth, sharing, saliency, tools, journeys, and GEO/E-E-A-T

---

### 2. Strengths

**Architecture & Code Quality:**
- ✅ Well-organized structure with clear separation (app/lib/components)
- ✅ TypeScript throughout with type definitions
- ✅ Comprehensive knowledge base (26 docs in `knowledge/`)
- ✅ Centralized caching with tag-based invalidation (`lib/cache.ts`)
- ✅ Code splitting for heavy components (dynamic imports with `ssr: false`)

**Features:**
- ✅ Multi-device scanning (desktop/tablet/mobile)
- ✅ Domain-wide crawling with sitemap support
- ✅ AI-powered journey simulation
- ✅ GEO/E-E-A-T analysis with competitive benchmarking
- ✅ Saliency heatmap fusion (SUM + DOM structure + optional LLM)
- ✅ Share links with optional password protection
- ✅ PDF report generation
- ✅ i18n support (DE/EN, 526 lines each)

**Performance:**
- ✅ Server-side caching (Next.js `unstable_cache`)
- ✅ Background job processing for long-running scans
- ✅ Code splitting reduces initial bundle size
- ✅ Pagination for large result sets

**Accessibility:**
- ✅ WCAG scanning with axe-core + HTML_CodeSniffer
- ✅ ARIA validation in scanner
- ✅ Keyboard navigation support (`tabIndex`, `onKeyDown`)
- ✅ Focus order analysis
- ✅ Touch target size vali

---
